hero_subtitle: SFTY helps regulators connect tokenized asset data, market signals, and case workflows into a secure supervisory layer for evidence-driven oversight and reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision breaks without connected asset data
problem_description: Regulators struggle to maintain clear oversight when tokenized asset information and market signals remain isolated across separate systems. This fragmentation slows risk detection, weakens evidence trails, and complicates coordinated supervisory action.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY integrates fragmented RWA and tokenized asset data with licensing, wallet activity, risk signals, cases, and reporting into one secure supervisory layer for government oversight and evidence-based actions.
workflow_title: From market signals to supervisory actions
workflow_description: SFTY connects diverse market data, wallet activity and entity profiles into structured supervisory alerts, cases, evidence and regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. Supervisory market context
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data, licensing, wallets, cases and evidence into one supervisory layer built for real-world asset oversight workflows and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports regulators with secure deployment, role-based access and evidence-grade logging to manage real-world asset supervision within a procurement-safe framework.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support oversight of real-world asset tokenization
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows manage tokenized asset supervision
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade logging supports regulatory reporting
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe multi-provider orchestration for supervisory data integration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for RWA market supervision?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators a connected supervisory layer connecting tokenized asset data, entity profiles, wallets, KYC/KYB, Travel Rule, and risk signals for comprehensive RWA market oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures workflows by linking alerts and risk signals to cases, supporting assignments, review notes, evidence collection and supervisory actions in one connected platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit logs, decision records, supporting evidence and case history to support supervisory reviews and reporting workflows remain transparent and defensible.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing government systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports modular integration with government registries, reporting channels and existing supervisory platforms while maintaining secure data access and audit governance.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace providers for regulators?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY works above multiple providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing analytics, KYC, KYB or Travel Rule systems used by regulators.
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects market signals, licensing data and cases into structured oversight and evidence-grade reporting.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
